name: FX AID 1U
description: Compact 1U stereo effects processor with 32 user-loadable programs from a library of 200+. Programs include delays, reverbs, choruses, phasers, filters, pitch shifters, drum emulations, and more. CV-controllable.

controls.name: Control 1
controls.description: Primary parameter knob. Function is program-dependent (e.g. Delay Time, Rate, Frequency, Tune, Threshold).
controls.detail: Function labeled in program list · CV assignable

controls.name: Control 2
controls.description: Secondary parameter knob. Function is program-dependent (e.g. Feedback, Depth, Resonance, Attack, Chorus).
controls.detail: Function labeled in program list · CV assignable

controls.name: Control 3
controls.description: Tertiary parameter knob. Function is program-dependent (e.g. Tone, xFade, Decay, Semitone Shift, Knee).
controls.detail: Function labeled in program list · CV assignable

controls.name: D/W (Dry/Wet)
controls.description: Dry/wet mix knob. Controls blend between dry input signal and processed effect output.
controls.detail: Full CCW = dry · Full CW = wet

controls.name: Bank Button (left)
controls.description: Selects the active bank (4 banks of 8 programs). Hold 2 seconds to enter preset selection mode.

controls.name: Program Button (right)
controls.description: Advances to the next program within the current bank. Also used to navigate presets.

inputs.name: R (Right)
inputs.description: Right stereo audio input. Normalled to L for mono-to-stereo processing.

inputs.name: CV / D/W
inputs.description: Assignable CV input. By default controls Dry/Wet mix. Can be reassigned to Control 1, 2, 3, sample rate reducer, or preset selection.

behaviors.name: Program Selection
behaviors.description: 4 banks × 8 programs = 32 user-loadable slots. Factory presets include Delay Tape, Ping Pong, HP/LP delay, Reverb Plate, Reverb Hall, Shimmer, Flanger, Phaser, Pitch Shifter, Wave Folder, Bit Crusher, and 808/909 drum emulations.

behaviors.name: Preset Storage
behaviors.trigger: hold right button until LEDs off, then left to select
behaviors.description: Store 4 quick presets including current program + Control 1/2/3 + D/W positions. Recall by holding 2 seconds then navigating with right button.

behaviors.name: CV Assignment
behaviors.description: Reassign the CV input to control: Control 1 (LED 1), Control 2 (LED 2), Control 3 (LED 3), Sample Rate Reducer (LED 4), or Preset Selection (LED 1+5). Click through options then hold to confirm.

behaviors.name: Firmware / Bank Loading
behaviors.description: Build custom banks of 32 programs from 200+ available algorithms via fxaid.app. Download wave file, play into CV input to flash firmware. USB-C not available on 1U — audio-wave update only.

patchIdeas.name: CV-controlled reverb decay
patchIdeas.patch: Load Reverb Hall · assign CV to Control 2 (Decay) · LFO → CV for evolving decay times

patchIdeas.name: Clocked delay
patchIdeas.patch: Load Delay Clock Sync · clock → CV input (assign CV to Control 1) · clock divides/multiplies delay time

patchIdeas.name: Shimmer pad generator
patchIdeas.patch: Load Shimmer Input Dual · slow attack source → L input · D/W at 100% for pure shimmer
